goal: Pull the directory structure of Russ's codebase and begin reviewing the architecture for inefficiencies or gaps in functionality.

plan_steps.description: List all files in Russ's codebase directory.
acceptance_criteria: A comprehensive list of all files and directories within Russ's codebase is generated.

plan_steps.description: Identify the main components or modules in the codebase.
acceptance_criteria: Key components or modules are identified and categorized based on their functionality.

plan_steps.description: Analyze the architecture for inefficiencies or gaps in functionality.
acceptance_criteria: A detailed report highlighting potential inefficiencies and gaps is generated.

spoken_summary: I wasn't able to pull that directory structure — I don't have access to Russ's codebase yet. Do you want to point me to a specific folder path so I can get started on the architecture review?
